title: RedisTrade
body:
RedisTrade is a cross-server trade plugin, designed to make item exchanges between players on different servers seamless

It is also proxy-less, meaning it doesn't require any additional proxy plugins

#         [Discord](https://discord.gg/c6MBaKtkDc) - [Documentation](https://emibergo.gitbook.io/redistrade) - [GitHub](https://github.com/Emibergo02/RedisTrade) - [Support](https://discord.gg/c6MBaKtkDc)
